description: Invideo is an online AI video creation platform for generating and editing videos from text prompts, with tools for scripts, voiceovers, stock or generated visuals, subtitles, and related media workflows.
summary: Invideo exposes MCP servers for AI agents: a public SSE remote MCP endpoint at `https://mcp.invideo.io/sse` and an OAuth-protected hosted MCP endpoint at `https://app-mcp.invideo.io`.
